Christian Smith | Loveland Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Prepare for a techno voyage with the maestro Christian Smith at Loveland Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Nic Fanciulli | Music On Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Get ready for a sonic adventure with Nic Fanciulli at Music On Festival 2023 in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Bry Ortega (live) | Opera de Arame | Brazil
programme.desc: Hop on a fast tracked techno live set.

programme.title: Angel Sanchez | Moga Festival 2024 | Essaouira (Morocco)
programme.desc: Angel Sanchez, a DJ with over 20 years of experience, is currently the music director at Playa Padre and Momento, two clubs that have transformed the electronic music scene in Marbella.

programme.title: Carl Cox | Awakenings 2018 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Relive the magic of Carl Cox at Awakenings 2018 in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Hernan Cattaneo b2b Nick Warren | Loveland Festival 2023 Part 2 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Experience the celestial synergy of Hernan Cattaneo and Nick Warren in Part 2 of Loveland Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Carl Craig | 909 Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Prepare for a techno odyssey with the legendary Carl Craig at 909 Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Matthias Tanzmann | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Matthias Tanzmann stars in this edition of 'Pacha On Air' recorded live at Pacha Munich.

programme.title: Stimming | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Stimming performs live for the Ritter Butzke on Tour series from Berlins legendary Friedrichstadt-Palast.

programme.title: Pacho | Birthday 2022 at Bedroom Beach Club | Sunny Beach (Bulgaria)
programme.desc: Pacho Birthday 2022 at Bedroom Beach Club in Sunny Beach, Bulgaria.

programme.title: Marwan Dua | Untold Festival x Daydreaming stage 2022 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Marwan Dua playing magical vibes on Daydreaming stage at Untold Festival 2022.

programme.title: Roman Weber | The Daybreak Session | Kolnbreinsperre Malta | Austria
programme.desc: Roman Weber performing from the biggest reservoir in Europe - the Kölnbreinsperre in Malta, Austria - with a special smooth melodic Daybreak Session.

programme.title: Apollonia | Music On Festival 2019 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Apollonia returning to the famous Dutch event Music On 2019 in Amsterdam.

programme.title: Majes | Impact Techno Winter Rave 2023 | Le Mans (France)
programme.desc: Get ready for an electrifying journey with Majes at Impact Techno Winter Rave 2023.

programme.title: Paul van Dyk | Alfa Future People | Russia
programme.desc: At Alfa Future People Festival, Paul van Dyk took us on a melodic and progressive trance journey creating the dynamic of his set by slowing down and building back up his set at right moments.

programme.title: Manu Sanchez | DropTV | Aüra Mallorca Edition | Spain
programme.desc: Manu Sanchez dj set at the first edition of Aüra in Sa Foradada (Mallorca - Spain), right at the Tramuntana Montains Natural Park protected by UNESCO.

programme.title: Joris Voorn | Audio Obscura x Revere Series | Kinderdijk (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Experience the captivating performance of Joris Voorn at the Audio Obscura x Revere Series in Kinderdijk, Netherlands.

programme.title: Tenishia | Chasing Sunsets at Fort Manoel | Malta
programme.desc: Tenishia delivers an unforgettable set at Chasing Sunsets from the breathtaking Fort Manoel in Malta, blending cinematic melodies and progressive beats with sweeping views of the Mediterranean. This stunning performance captures both the beauty of the location and the emotional depth of Tenishiaâ€™s sound, creating a perfect harmony between music and landscape.

programme.title: Tenishia | Chasing Sunsets at Fort Manoel | Malta
programme.desc: Tenishia delivers an unforgettable set at Chasing Sunsets from the breathtaking Fort Manoel in Malta, blending cinematic melodies and progressive beats with sweeping views of the Mediterranean. This stunning performance captures both the beauty of the location and the emotional depth of Tenishiaâ€™s sound, creating a perfect harmony between music and landscape.

programme.title: Tenishia | Chasing Sunsets at Fort Manoel | Malta
programme.desc: Tenishia delivers an unforgettable set at Chasing Sunsets from the breathtaking Fort Manoel in Malta, blending cinematic melodies and progressive beats with sweeping views of the Mediterranean. This stunning performance captures both the beauty of the location and the emotional depth of Tenishiaâ€™s sound, creating a perfect harmony between music and landscape.

programme.title: Dj Boring | Wonderland 2024 | Paris (France)
programme.desc: Get ready to groove with DJ Boring at Wonderland 2024 in Paris, France.

programme.title: Satori | Audio Obscura x Revere Series | Netherlands
programme.desc: Satori brought a mesmerizing fusion of live instrumentation and electronic sounds to Audio Obscura: Revere Series at Kinderdijk, Netherlands. Surrounded by the iconic windmills of this UNESCO World Heritage site, his organic rhythms and spiritual melodies created a magical connection between music and nature.

programme.title: Tenishia | Chasing Sunsets at Castello Zammitello 2024 | Mgarr (Malta)
programme.desc: Join Tenishia for an unforgettable evening at Castello Zammitello in MÄ¡arr, Malta.

programme.title: Franky Rizardo | Music On Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a rhythmic journey with Franky Rizardo at Music On Festival 2023 in the dynamic city of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Xenia | Radio Intense | Balloon Festival | Kyiv (Ukraine)
programme.desc: Xenia heat up the winter Balloon festival for Radio Intense in Kiev, Ukraine

programme.title: Afrojack | Ultra Music Festival 2017 | Miami (USA)
programme.desc: Relive the electrifying performance of Afrojack at Ultra Music Festival 2017 in Miami, USA.

programme.title: Away To: Saqqara Necropolis with Ahmed Samy - By Late Knights & Creative State | Cairo (Egypt)
programme.desc: Taking over the famous Pyramids for a nighttime adventure.

programme.title: Luca Bacchetti | Ancient Future | Tuscany (Italy)
programme.desc: The ANCIENT FUTURE live stream, coming out of the stunning medieval Verrucole castle situated in the heart of Tuscany.

programme.title: DJ Rush | Blakksheep Showcase | ADE2015 | Dockyard Festival | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Blakksheep's showcase at Dockyard Festival was in for a perfect ending when DJ Rush stepped behind the decks. He delivered a powerful performance filled with heavy techno beats. His relentless energy spoke to his crowd, which reciprocated in ceaseless dancing and loads of hand-waving.

programme.title: Miss Melera & Olivier Weiter | Loveland Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Dive into an enchanting musical collaboration with Miss Melera & Olivier Weiter at Loveland Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Amorphic (live) | 909 Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the live electronic experience with Amorphic at 909 Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Franky Rizardo | Music On Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a rhythmic journey with Franky Rizardo at Music On Festival 2023 in the dynamic city of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Moonbootica | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Rocking house sounds of Moonbootica for the Pacha On Air series recorded at Pacha Munich. Enjoy!

programme.title: Hardwell | United We Are | Hockenheim (Germany)
programme.desc: Witness the electrifying performance of Hardwell at United We Are in Hockenheim, Germany.

programme.title: Zlatina Dimitrova | aiffexperience 2024 | Sofia (Bulgaria)
programme.desc: Join the musical journey with Zlatina Dimitrova at aiffexperience 2024, set to take place in the vibrant city of Sofia, Bulgaria.

programme.title: S3A | Wonderland 2024 | Paris (France)
programme.desc: Experience the dynamic sounds of S3A at Wonderland 2024 in Paris, France.

programme.title: Martin Garrix | Hydeout: The Prelude | Netherlands
programme.desc: Martin Garrix brings his signature festival energy to Hydeout: The Prelude, performing a next-level DJ set from the Netherlands. With massive drops, melodic highs, and cutting-edge visuals, this virtual experience captures Garrix at his bestâ€”blending emotion, energy, and innovation in a show that redefines digital performance.

programme.title: Alok | UNTOLD Festival 2021 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Alok live from UNTOLD Festival 2021. For the first time in Romania, the rising Brazilian artist amazed the crowd with his magical show on the mainstage.

programme.title: Dimitri | 909 Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the infectious beats of Dimitri at 909 Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: YokoO | Grounded Festival | Eilat (Israel)
programme.desc: YokoO is no stranger to house music in all its deepest forms. As a DJ, YokoO embraces the dancefloor with a dynamic and honest approach, sparking it up with forward thinking music every time. Here’s the occasion to enjoy the man going deep at Grounded Festival in Eilat, Israel.

programme.title: Andrea Oliva b2b Davide Squillace | Extrema Outdoor | Netherlands
programme.desc: Enjoy ANTS taking over Extrema Outdoor NL 2017 with an explosive b2b performance of Andrea Oliva and Davide Squillace made of powerful tech house topped with catchy vocals.

programme.title: Andrea Oliva b2b Davide Squillace | Extrema Outdoor | Netherlands
programme.desc: Enjoy ANTS taking over Extrema Outdoor NL 2017 with an explosive b2b performance of Andrea Oliva and Davide Squillace made of powerful tech house topped with catchy vocals.

programme.title: Andrea Oliva b2b Davide Squillace | Extrema Outdoor | Netherlands
programme.desc: Enjoy ANTS taking over Extrema Outdoor NL 2017 with an explosive b2b performance of Andrea Oliva and Davide Squillace made of powerful tech house topped with catchy vocals.

programme.title: Prismode & Solvane | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Our next excursion with Ritter Butzke is with Prismode & Solvane at the HauptstadtfloÃŸ Berlin in Germany.

programme.title: Nikk. | Chasing Sunsets x UV at Notte Bianca | Valletta Ditch (Malta)
programme.desc: Nikk. closes the night at Chasing Sunsets x UV during Notte Bianca 2025 in Valletta Ditch, Malta, with a tech and house-driven set that locks into pure late-night groove. Surrounded by the historic energy of Valletta and the festivalâ€™s glowing ambiance, his finale delivers a smooth, hypnotic flow that brings the celebration to a perfect close.

programme.title: Roman Weber | Fairytale of the Knights | Riegersburg Castle | Austria
programme.desc: Roman Weber performs at the Riegersburg Castle on the edge of an extinct Vulcano.

programme.title: Fedde Le Grand | De Keukenhof (The Garden of Europe) | Lisse (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Experience the magic of Fedde Le Grand at De Keukenhof, also known as The Garden of Europe, in Lisse, Netherlands.

programme.title: Mayze x Faria | Xplaces Castelo de GuimarÃ£es | Portugal
programme.desc: After Amares and Viana do Castelo in 2020, the video project X Places will have its new edition in the cradle of the nation, in the city of GuimarÃ£es, more precisely in Castelo de GuimarÃ£es.

programme.title: Greenjack | Radio Intense | Girona (Spain)
programme.desc: Greenjack exclusive DJ set for Radio Intense in Girona, Spain.

programme.title: Volt & State | Protocol X ADE 2015 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Journey back to a memorable night during Amsterdam Dance Event 2015, where dynamic duo Volt & State delivered an unforgettable set at Protocol Recordings' showcase.

programme.title: Away To: Kfardebian with C EL b2b G! - By Late Knights & Creative State | Beirut (Lebanon)
programme.desc: You are watching "Away To" with Factory People and Creative State. A series of socially distant musical gatherings with cool places and cool people.

programme.title: ATB | UNTOLD Festival 2022 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: ATB playing on mainstage at UNTOLD Festival 2022 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania.

programme.title: Dj Boring | Wonderland 2024 | Paris (France)
programme.desc: Get ready to groove with DJ Boring at Wonderland 2024 in Paris, France.

programme.title: VNTM (live) | Loveland Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Prepare for an electrifying live experience with VNTM at Loveland Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Away To: Faqra with Lehar - By Late Knights & Creative State | Beirut (Lebanon)
programme.desc: A name we know all too well, Lehar headlines our Away To Faqra.

programme.title: Mees Salome | Loveland Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a captivating musical journey with Mees SalomÃ© at Loveland Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Carl Cox | The Revolution at Space | Ibiza
programme.desc: The King of Clubs rocks the main room of Space once again as a packed floor explodes to his throbbing mix of tribal, techno, and tech house sounds. 'The Revolution Continues' after the jump.

programme.title: Ricardo Villalobos | Sunwaves | Mamaia (Romania)
programme.desc: Ricardo Villalobos will take you on a unique journey with his performance at the Sunwaves festival in Mamaia (Romania). He starts off slow and ingeniously builds and builds his set to end in a massive explosion of party-madness.

programme.title: Away To: Baadaran Airport with Pomme Rouge - By Late Knights & Creative State (Lebanon)
programme.desc: In the mountains of Baadaran in the south of Lebanon lies an abandoned airport, the perfect playground for a party, cruising through the airways with electro duo Pomme Rouge

programme.title: Various Artists | Ultra Music Festival 2019 | Croatia
programme.desc: Experience the sound of summer at Ultra Music Festival Europe. This video brings together standout tracks from various artists who define the energy, scale, and pulse of one of the worldâ€™s biggest electronic music festivals.

programme.title: Stefanie Raschke | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Pacha On Air w Stefanie Raschke, recorded at Pacha Munich. Pacha may be closed at the time of filming due to the COVID-19 pandemic but the beat lives on!

programme.title: Nicole Moudaber | Loveland Festival | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Loveland Festival was in full swing when Nicole Moudaber took control of the booth. She delivered an hour of fine techno tunes, starting off with deep and dark vibes occasionally introducing sensuous vocals and building up her set towards more industrial feeling.

programme.title: Emanuel Satie | Laute Wiese RECD. at Lil Tiger Rooftop Terrace | Essen (Germany)
programme.desc: Panoramic DJ set by Emanuel Satie (Cocoon) on the Lil Tiger Rooftop Terrace in Essen, Germany.

programme.title: Apollonia | Music On Festival 2023 Part 1 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a rhythmic odyssey with Apollonia at Music On Festival 2023 in the vibrant city of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Apollonia | Music On Festival 2023 Part 1 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a rhythmic odyssey with Apollonia at Music On Festival 2023 in the vibrant city of Amsterdam, Netherlands.
